---
type: note
statuses: [draft, solid, canonical]
---

# note
A refined, reusable piece of knowledge — **one idea**, named by what it teaches (not where it came
from). Carries a `status:` from the maturity ladder (`draft` initial extraction → `solid` corroborated
by multiple sources or real experience → `canonical` well-established) and an `origin:`
(`sourced | organic | both`). Links back to its source(s) with a **lineage edge carrying the key
quote** (`CLAUDE.md` §10). When a new source covers an idea already captured, **enrich the existing
note and add a citation** — don't make a near-duplicate.
